About Me

Passionate about
Cloud & Code

Hi! I'm Akibul H. Akib, a passionate student currently pursuing my Diploma in Computer Science Engineering. I'm building a strong foundation in Cloud Computing, AWS, Python, Computer Networking, and Web Development.

I love turning ideas into real digital products. My goal is to become a certified AWS Cloud Engineer and contribute to building scalable, secure cloud-based solutions that make a real impact.

When I'm not coding, you'll find me exploring the latest cloud tech, reading about networking protocols, or working on personal projects to sharpen my skills.

☁️ Cloud Computing 🐍 Python 🌐 Networking 🖥️ Web Dev 🤖 AI Tools 🐧 Linux
